content: SSE in Next.js App Router: use Route Handlers with ReadableStream. Required: export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic' to prevent caching/static optimization. Content-Type: text/event-stream, Cache-Control: no-cache, Connection: keep-alive. Pattern: const stream = new ReadableStream({ start(controller) { ... } }); return new Response(stream, { headers }). Client: EventSource API handles reconnection automatically. For notifications: SSE is appropriate for server-to-client real-time push without WebSocket complexity. The existing WebSocket relay already handles daemon connections; SSE is the right transport for dashboard notification push (separate concern). Add ?_token= query param for auth since EventSource cannot send custom headers (same pattern as existing web/lib/auth.ts).
